title: scorzoneroides autumnalis var. salina
intro: Scorzoneroides autumnalis var. salina, also known as Autumnal Knawel, is a type of plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is native to the Mediterranean region. Its roots and leaves have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Scorzoneroides autumnalis var. salina include its ability to help reduce blood pressure, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. It can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
